text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racecourse is abuzz with excitement about
the showdown between Silence Suzuka, the
Otherworldly Front-Runner, and Air Groove, the
Empress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two exchange few words as they approach
their challenge.
